/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rogueLike.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rogueLike.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/rogueLike.dir/functionsTools.c.o CMakeFiles/rogueLike.dir/functionsGame.c.o CMakeFiles/rogueLike.dir/functionsMaps.c.o CMakeFiles/rogueLike.dir/functionsDraw.c.o CMakeFiles/rogueLike.dir/functionsPlayer.c.o -o rogueLike  -lncursesw
